name: coder-q4boost
description: CODE-specialized: IQ2 everywhere, Q4_K experts on the 6 layers a code-benchmark imatrix activates hardest
_note: The `bench` block calibrates on REAL, non-saturated code benchmarks fetched from benchy (HumanEval + MBPP + MMLU-CS), with gold answers included and a reasoning mix to avoid overfit. `forgequant build coder-q4boost` fetches+renders the corpus, collects coder.dat, then quantizes with the 6 code-hottest layers upcast to Q4_K. `paths coder-q4boost` shows the activation map; `suggest` re-tunes the layer count.
